description:
Offered: every other year
This course treats the Revolution not simply as an event, but also as an idea. Thus, we examine the origins and various manifestations of the revolutionary spirit between 1789 and 1815. Heavy emphasis is placed on primary sources, as well as theoretical and historiographical issues.
Prerequisite(s): AMST 1800 or ENGL 1200 or HIST 1000 or HIST 1100 or HIST 1400 or HIST 1500
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, HI
prerequisites: AMST 1800 or ENGL 1200 or HIST 1000 or HIST 1100 or HIST 1400 or HIST 1500
